subcodes.title: Words to Isabel Fraser, spoken on 1913-09-24
subcodes.first_line: We must not be attached to anything in the world. It is not worth one thought. We must not
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause
